hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$(basename "$f")" in .env|.env.test|.env.local|credentials.json) jq -n --arg f "$f" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("Blocked: writes to secret file \($f) are not allowed")}}';; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) bun eslint --fix "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
